name: ai-build-intelligence-mcp
description: MCP server exposing Azure DevOps build data and Wiki publishing tools for the AI Build Intelligence agent.

tools.name: get_failed_builds
tools.description: Retrieve recent failed Azure DevOps pipeline runs, enriched with per-task error details.

pipeline_ids.description: Optional list of pipeline definition IDs to filter by.

top.description: Maximum number of failed builds to return.

tools.name: mine_failure_patterns
tools.description: Group build failures into heuristic patterns based on task names and error messages.

failures.description: Array of BuildFailure objects as returned by get_failed_builds.

min_cluster_size.description: Minimum number of occurrences to form a cluster.

tools.name: analyse_root_causes
tools.description: Use Azure OpenAI GPT to analyse failure patterns and produce root cause findings with remediation steps.

patterns.description: Array of FailurePattern objects as returned by mine_failure_patterns.

tools.name: publish_wiki_report
tools.description: Render findings as Markdown and upsert to the configured Azure DevOps Wiki page.

findings.description: Array of RootCauseFinding objects as returned by analyse_root_causes.

dry_run.description: When true, return the Markdown without publishing.
